name: landing-page-saas
description: B2B SaaS marketing landing — clarity, social proof, pricing

design-brief.content:
Northstar Analytics sells an embedded analytics SDK to product teams. Audience: technical PMs and engineering leads at Series B+ SaaS companies. Tone: confident, precise, not hype-y. Visual vibe: dark-friendly with a single accent (electric blue), generous whitespace, monospace for code snippets.

Above the fold must answer: what it is, who it is for, and primary CTA (book a technical demo). Include a short social proof strip (logos or testimonial quotes). Include a pricing section with three tiers (Starter / Team / Enterprise) even if copy is abbreviated.

existing-design.content: Greenfield; no existing brand beyond name and accent color.

research-context.content: Buyers compare on time-to-integrate, data residency, and dashboard embed UX. Common objection: will this slow our app?

objectives-metrics.content: Increase qualified demo requests from technical evaluators. Success: clear primary CTA, proof of low-latency integration, trust indicators near pricing.

design-constraints.content: Static HTML/CSS/JS only. No npm, no frameworks. Google Fonts allowlist only. One primary CTA color. Mobile-first layout.

strategy.name: Social proof density near decisions
strategy.hypothesis: Placing recognizable customer proof and a latency/GPU-style performance cue directly adjacent to the primary demo CTA will increase perceived safety for technical buyers without feeling like marketing fluff.
strategy.rationale: Technical buyers anchor on risk reduction; proximity of evidence to the commitment point reduces mental backtracking.
strategy.measurements: Qualitative rubric: hypothesis obvious above fold; proof visible within one scroll of CTA; pricing scannable in under 20s.
